description_long: This modern bungalow is surrounded by lush green hedges and features a spacious yard with a swimming pool and outdoor seating area. The building itself is primarily rectangular with clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of large glass windows and brown paneling. Two prominent pink-blossomed trees frame the property, adding a vibrant natural element. The front facade includes a patio with outdoor furniture, while the rear side opens to a private pool area. The property is enclosed by manicured hedges, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, brown paneling, a private pool, and lush landscaping with pink-blossomed trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the front, highlighting the main entrance, a large pink-blossomed tree, and the hedge-lined yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the bungalow, featuring the pool, outdoor seating, and two pink-blossomed trees flanking the property.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow with a clear view of the pool, outdoor lounge area, and the extensive hedge boundary.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the property from the back, emphasizing the two large pink-blossomed trees and the hedge-enclosed yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
